synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1836 Oracle Linux 10 libvirt bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1836
description:
[11.5.0-4.5.0.1]
- Set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from changelog [Orabug: 32019554]

[11.5.0-4.5.el10_1]
- esx: Allow disk images in subdirectories (RHEL-140865)
- esx_util: Introduce esxUtil_EscapeInventoryObject() (RHEL-140465)
- esx: URI encode inventory objects twice (RHEL-140465)

[11.5.0-4.4.el10_1]
- qemu: correctly detect working TDX support (RHEL-129673)

[11.5.0-4.3.el10_1]
- qemu: tpm: Account for possible migration without actually sharing storage (RHEL-132920)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1836

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1836.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libvirt-daemon-driver-nwfilter-11.5.0-4.5.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/libvirt-11.5.0-4.5.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[11.5.0-4.5.0.1]
- Set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from changelog [Orabug: 32019554]

[11.5.0-4.5.el10_1]
- esx: Allow disk images in subdirectories (RHEL-140865)
- esx_util: Introduce esxUtil_EscapeInventoryObject() (RHEL-140465)
- esx: URI encode inventory objects twice (RHEL-140465)

[11.5.0-4.4.el10_1]
- qemu: correctly detect working TDX support (RHEL-129673)

[11.5.0-4.3.el10_1]
- qemu: tpm: Account for possible migration without actually sharing storage (RHEL-132920)
